nasb.text: Jesus said, “Truly I say to you, there is no one who has left house or brothers or sisters or mother or father or children or farms, for My sake and for the gospel’s sake,

esv.text: Jesus said, “Truly, I say to you, there is no one who has left house or brothers or sisters or mother or father or children or lands, for my sake and for the gospel,

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“我實在告訴你們，人為著我和福音捨棄了房屋、弟兄、姊妹、母親、父親、兒女、田地，

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“我实在告诉你们，任何人为了我和福音而撇下房屋、弟兄、姊妹、父母、儿女或田地，

csbs.text: 耶稣说：“我确实地告诉你们：无论谁为我的缘故、为福音的缘故而舍弃房屋，或兄弟，或姐妹，或母亲，或父亲，或儿女，或田产，
